recommended.song_name: How Can You Mend A Broken Heart

content:
Song: Too Late For Goodbyes
Artist: Julian Lennon
Tabbed By: Ben Brown

The other person didn't have it in the right key, and there was an error..
Enjoy!

Intro:  [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]   x4  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   x2

[tab][ch]A[/ch]                       [ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]Em7[/ch]
 Ever since you've been leaving me I've been wanting to cry[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]Em7/G[/ch]
 Now I know how it feels for you I've been wanting to die[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
But it's much too late for goodbyes yes it's much too late for goodbyes[/tab]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]Em7[/ch]
 Time has gone since I've been with you We've been starting to die[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]Em7[/ch]
 Now it seems you don't care for me And I don't understand why[/tab]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]Em7[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]Em7[/ch]
 Ever since you've been far away I've been wanting to fly[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]   
 Now I know what you meant to me I'm the one who should cry[/tab]
